item.title: The official documentation for boto3-refresh-session and boto3-client-cache moved
item.author: lettsmt@gmail.com (Mike Letts)
item.description:
The official documentation for boto3-refresh-session moved here and boto3-client-cache here.

Analytics show a surprising number of you continue coming to this website looking for that documentation, resulting in a 404 error. Although I introduced a redirection script for your convenience, please update your bookmarks and star those projects on GitHub so that you don’t important announcements.
item.content:encoded:
The official documentation for boto3-refresh-session moved here and boto3-client-cache here.

Analytics show a surprising number of you continue coming to this website looking for that documentation, resulting in a 404 error. Although I introduced a redirection script for your convenience, please update your bookmarks and star those projects on GitHub so that you don’t important announcements.
